narrative:
Hubbard Ex Vill Sd (Trumbull) exempted village school district has 9,141 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.9 percentage points.
